subject: Re: Lab Results - March 2027
body: Dr. Walker, got the results. Want to discuss the kidney numbers and the Metformin dosage at the Thursday appointment. Tim

subject: Re: Fence line east run
body: Calvin, I looked at the quote and the contract numbers don't match. Let's sort this out before I sign anything. Tim

subject: Re: Easter weekend plans
body: Elaine, sounds good. Tell Tyler I'll have the south pasture ready for him. If the storm clears by Friday we should be fine. Tim

subject: Council briefing notes - road conditions
body: Tom, attaching my notes on the south access road for the next meeting. Got photos and weather data to back it up. Tim

subject: Re: Calving workshop follow-up
body: Margaret, good workshop this year. Happy to host the next mentee session once calving wraps up. Tim

subject: Re: March feed delivery
body: Dave, got the 50 bales on the 18th but my count shows 340 total and that doesn't add up with what I had before. Can you check the delivery ticket? Tim

subject: VA benefits inquiry
body: To whom it may concern, writing to confirm my monthly disability payment status for March 2027. Veteran ID on file. Timothy Pratt

subject: Sunday call topics
body: James, few things for Sunday: ranch finances for Q1, Tyler's wrestling schedule, and that college fund balance. Talk then. Dad

subject: Thursday vet visit - Tag 127 and 131
body: Roy, need you to look at Tag 127 - she's close. Also want to verify the twin records on 131 from last week. See you Thursday if the weather holds. Tim

subject: Checking in
body: Frank, haven't seen you at the diner in a couple weeks. Everything alright? Coffee Wednesday if you're up for it. Tim
